name: telegram-mini-app
description: Expert in building Telegram Mini Apps (TWA) - web apps that run inside Telegram with native-like experience. Covers the TON ecosystem, Telegram Web App API, payments, user authentication, and building viral mini apps that monetize. Use when: telegram mini app, TWA, telegram web app, TON app, mini app.
capabilities: Design Mini App architecture using Telegram Web App API
Integrate TON Connect for wallet connections and blockchain transactions
Implement in-app payments using Telegram Stars and TON
Build viral referral mechanics and gamification features
Create mobile-first responsive UI matching Telegram theme
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analyzer flagged 41 patterns that are all false positives. The skill file (SKILL.md) is documentation-only markdown containing code examples. Backticks are markdown code fences, not shell execution. URLs are official Telegram SDK links or documentation placeholders. No executable code or security risks present.
valueStatement: Create native-feeling web applications that run inside Telegram for 800M+ users. Integrate TON blockchain, payments, and viral mechanics without leaving the Telegram ecosystem.
userTitle: Build Telegram Mini Apps with TON Integration
limitations: Requires Telegram bot as entry point for Mini App distribution
TON Connect integration needs manifest file hosted on HTTPS domain
Mini Apps run in webview with Telegram API constraints
Payment processing limited to Telegram Stars and TON cryptocurrency

useCases.targetUser: Blockchain game developers targeting Telegram's 800M users
useCases.title: Web3 Gaming Mini App
useCases.description: Build a play-to-earn game with TON wallet integration, NFT rewards, and viral referral mechanics that spreads through Telegram shares.

useCases.targetUser: Small businesses selling directly through Telegram channels
useCases.title: E-commerce Storefront
useCases.description: Create a shoppable Mini App with Telegram Stars payments, order tracking, and seamless checkout inside the Telegram interface.

useCases.targetUser: Telegram channel admins and community managers
useCases.title: Community Engagement Tool
useCases.description: Develop a gamified loyalty app with daily rewards, streaks, leaderboards, and achievement badges to boost channel engagement.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Mini App Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Telegram Mini App HTML template with proper viewport settings, Telegram Web App SDK initialization, and user data extraction from initDataUnsafe.
promptTemplates.scenario: Starting a new Mini App project from scratch

promptTemplates.title: React Mini App with Hooks
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a React hook for Telegram Web App integration that exposes user data, query ID, and core methods like expand, close, and ready with proper TypeScript types.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building a Mini App using React framework

promptTemplates.title: TON Wallet Integration
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement TON Connect wallet integration for a React Mini App including the UI provider wrapper, connection button component, and manifest file configuration.
promptTemplates.scenario: Adding cryptocurrency wallet connection to Web3 Mini App

promptTemplates.title: Payment and Transaction Flow
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a payment button component that sends TON transactions using tonConnectUI, handles nanoton conversion, and sets transaction validity windows.
promptTemplates.scenario: Implementing cryptocurrency payments in a Mini App

bestPractices: Always validate initData using Telegram's HMAC verification on your backend before trusting user identity
Match Telegram theme using themeParams CSS variables for seamless native feel
Design mobile-first with touch targets minimum 44px and test on actual devices
antiPatterns: Ignoring Telegram theme parameters resulting in jarring visual transitions
Designing for desktop when 95 percent of Telegram usage is mobile
Skipping loading states which makes users think the app is broken

faq.question: How do users discover my Mini App?
faq.answer: Mini Apps are accessed through bot commands, inline buttons, or direct links. Users can also find them via Telegram's Mini Apps directory once published.

faq.question: Can I use my existing web app as a Mini App?
faq.answer: Yes, but you must integrate the Telegram Web App SDK and adapt your UI to match Telegram theme. Mobile-first responsive design is essential.

faq.question: What is TON Connect and do I need it?
faq.answer: TON Connect is a protocol for connecting TON wallets to Mini Apps. You only need it if your app requires blockchain transactions or crypto payments.

faq.question: How do Telegram Stars payments work?
faq.answer: Telegram Stars is Telegram's virtual currency. Users buy Stars, then spend them in Mini Apps. Developers withdraw earnings as TON cryptocurrency.

faq.question: Can Mini Apps access user data without permission?
faq.answer: No. User data comes from initDataUnsafe which Telegram provides only when the user opens your Mini App. Always verify this data on your backend.

faq.question: Do I need to host my Mini App on specific servers?
faq.answer: Any HTTPS-hosted web app works. Telegram does not require specific hosting. However, TON Connect requires a valid HTTPS domain for the manifest file.
